evidence.network: N/A - build-request command only constructs request, doesn't invoke

steps.expected: CLI indicates browser automation is being used, fetch_url_with_browser() is called
steps.observed: Output shows '[pipeline] Using browser automation to fetch https://example.com...' and attempts to use Playwright

evidence.network: N/A - Playwright not installed, but browser tool invocation was correctly attempted

frictions.description: Playwright is not installed in the environment, so browser automation fails with an error message. This is expected behavior and actually confirms the browser tool is being invoked correctly.
frictions.resolution: Not applicable - Playwright installation is a separate setup step. The assertion only requires that browser tool is invoked, which it is.

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-URL-002: base64 conversion works correctly, VAL-URL-003: browser tool integration correctly invoked when --browser flag is used)
